speaker: Jancy
text: That's not true! This article and the letter said that your family needs a certain amount of money to become the richest family in the city - in fact, it's 500,000 dollars! Exactly as much as Alistair Richman said the ransom was!

speaker: Cassandra
text: ...Ugh!! Fine, I did help with the kidnapping! But only because the Gold family deserves to be the richest in the city. It's only right!

speaker: Cassandra
text: Anyways, you'll find her in the family mansion. I'm out of here!
